debug_info.goal:
μ ν : Measure ℝ
inst✝¹ : IsProbabilityMeasure μ
inst✝ : IsProbabilityMeasure ν
n : ℕ
i j : Fin n
h : i < j
⊢ HasLaw (fun ω => wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n)

  · exfalso; exact lt_irrefl _ (by simpa using h_eq)
  · rfl
  · exfalso; exact lt_asymm h h_lt
  apply HasLaw.of_pi_eval
  simp [wignerMeasureDist, h, le_of_lt]

  · exfalso; exact lt_irrefl i (by simpa using h_eq)
  · rfl
  · exfalso; exact lt_asymm h h_lt
